{{Alo inversion}}'''αα Have children'''

[[Category:Nine Commandments]]
[[sn:Commandment Alpha Alpha]]==Interpretation==
The fact this commandment is at the end indicates a high level of difficulty associated with it. It is ranked as though it is higher than [[Commandment Alpha Lambda]] which is the commandment of [[Apotheosis]]
[[Category:Childrearing]]
[[Category:Alpha Covenant]]
[[sn:Commandment Alpha Alpha]][[sn:Commandment Alpha Alpha]]==Overview==
The Commandments system might be put in question since it is rarely interpreted correctly. But they are still somewhat there.[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
